message:
test(fcp-mesh): expand tests for device, gossip, and admission modules (+117 tests)

device.rs: +56 tests covering builder chain methods, query methods,
FitnessScore computation (penalties/bonuses/ordering), hardware profiles,
FitnessContext builders, enum defaults, and constants.

gossip.rs: +44 tests covering XorFilterPlaceholder (inserts, digests, serde),
IbltPlaceholder (edge cases, encode/decode roundtrip, error paths),
GossipState (announce/remove, idempotency, summary creation),
GossipSummary (differs_from, is_stale, signing_bytes),
MeshGossip (prune_stale_peers, quarantine rejection),
PeerGossipState (failure tracking, reset), and serde for all message types.

admission.rs: +17 tests covering constants validation, AdmissionError trait
impls and serde for all variants, multi-peer tracking, PeerBudget ordering,
window edge cases, combined admission failure paths, GC edge cases,
amplification with zero/public policies, and strict vs non-strict limits.

Total fcp-mesh tests: 433 → 550

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
